fields.summary: Specifies the swizzle component mapping for Vulkan YCbCr conversion.
fields.remarks:
<format type="text/markdown"><![CDATA[
## Remarks

`GRVkYcbcrComponents` specifies how color components are mapped during Vulkan YCbCr (YUV)
sampler conversion. Each property corresponds to a Vulkan component swizzle value that
controls which source component feeds into each channel of the converted image.

This is a value type and does not require disposal.

## Examples

```csharp
var components = new GRVkYcbcrComponents
{
    R = 0, // VK_COMPONENT_SWIZZLE_IDENTITY
    G = 0,
    B = 0,
    A = 0,
};
```
]]></format>

fields.summary: Gets or sets the swizzle component for the alpha channel.
fields.value: The Vulkan component swizzle value for the alpha channel.
